workflows.description: Create your own workflows in our apps using our low-code platform.

1.title: Create and manage
1.description: workflows tailored to your specific needs. Define the steps, set data parameters, establish rules, and outline essential criteria to streamline and optimize your processes.

2.title: Determine where to use
2.description: these workflows, linking them to the desired apps and campaigns for seamless integration.

3.title: Define accesibility
3.description: as either private for individual use or global for organization-wide access, ensuring controlled interaction and maintaining data security.

hr.description: Recruit new employees and manage employee data

1.title: Recruit and manage new hires
1.description: by creating new job openings and assigning HR personnel to fill them using our internal applicant search tool. Convert successful applicants into employees.

2.title: Manage your employees
2.description: Manage your employees' personal information, track absence days, collect feedback, and handle all types of payments.

3.title: Keep track on hiring metrics
3.description: with our built-in analytics tool, offering insights into recruitment performance to optimize your strategies.

hr.tourDescription_organization: Recruit and manage new hires, automatize and track absence days, keep track on hiring metrics with our built-in analytics tool

documents.description: All documents with easy integration into HR and CRM

1.title: Create, edit and format files
1.description: tailored to both personal and professional requirements, enhancing productivity and collaboration within your organization.

2.title: Share documents
2.description: within your organization or with external users, enhancing collaboration and communication across various teams.

3.title: Access files from all apps

documents.tourDescription_organization: Create, edit and format files, share documents within your organization or external users, access files from all apps

accounting.description: Account overview, invoicing, dunning, contract management for expenses and revenues, cash management.

1.title: Financial Management
1.description: Easily track income, expenses, and transactions with a centralized dashboard. Automate invoice creation, payment tracking, and reconciliation to maintain accurate financial records effortlessly.

2.title: Smart Insights & Reporting
2.description: Gain real-time insights into your business finances with AI-driven analytics, customizable reports, and profit & loss statements. Stay informed with clear financial trends and predictive analysis for better decision-making.

3.title: Integration & Compliance
3.description: Connect with banking systems, tax authorities, and compliance regulations effortlessly. Ensure smooth financial operations with built-in automation for billing, tax calculations, and document management.

guestViewOptions.invitationText: You have been invited to collaborate on this file in Clusterix Clustercells!

clusterCloud.description: Cluster Cloud is a set of software components that provide common services for cloud infrastructure.

1.title: Seamless Cloud Management
1.description: Easily manage storage, virtual machines, and databases with a centralized interface.

2.title: Optimized Cost Tracking
2.description: Monitor and control cloud expenses with detailed cost breakdowns and analytics.

3.title: Scalable & Secure Infrastructure
3.description: Customize and scale your cloud environment while ensuring high security and reliability.

clusterDoc.description: Create new documents and export to other applications

1.title: Efficient document management
1.description: Design your documents according to your wishes. Start from scratch or upload existing files to customize them with our highly flexible document editor.

2.title: Working collaboratively on documents
2.description: Encourage teamwork and increase efficiency by working together on documents and granting access to all team members.

3.title: Effective document management in the cloud
3.description: Store all files securely in our cloud-based document management app for easy access anytime, anywhere.

clusterDoc.tourDescription_personal: Create and edit your files from scratch, or upload existing ones, store all documents securely in our document management app

clusterOffice.description: Create, edit, and manage all types of office documents

1.title: Powerful tools for every need
1.description: Includes Documents for text editing, Cells for spreadsheets, Presentation for slides, and Flow for diagrams and workflow planning.

2.title: Seamless collaboration
2.description: Edit, share, and collaborate in real-time, ensuring efficient teamwork and document management.

3.title: Store all documents securely
3.description: in our cloud-based documents management app, ensuring easy access anytime, anywhere.

companySearch.description: Find the perfect suppliers, customers & partners

1.description: We use AI and NLP to analyze company activities, distill key insights, and match your products with ideal customers efficiently.

2.title: Connect with campaigns

3.title: Stay organized & informed

timetracking.description: A powerful time tracking system. Assign times to tasks and gain an overview of how time is spent on various activities.

1.title: Track your time
1.description: and easily check your progress. Stop and restart or slip your time to enter detailed information on your events.

2.title: Allocate your working hours
2.description: to specific events, meetings, or tasks using our time tracking tool

3.title: Monitor all activities and statistics
3.description: using our analytics tool to gain insights into productivity levels and enhance overall efficiency.

timetracking.tourDescription_personal: Track your time and easily check your progress, allocate tasks, events or meeting to your timer, see your statistics

1.description: with our advanced project planning and cost management tools all in one place.

taskManagement.description: Create and configure tasks freely. Stay organized with pinned boards and your specific tasks

1.description: as notes on the task managements pinboards and easily drag and drop them to organize them into categories

2.description: and add the things you need to them, wether that is responsibles checklists, subtasks or something else

3.title: Keep track and connected
3.description: with our built in activity section that collects all activity and communication inside your task for your convenience

taskManagement.tourDescription_personal: Create and manage all your tasks, easily drag and drop to organize them into categories, customize tasks to your needs
taskManagement.tourDescription_organization: Create and manage all your tasks, customize tasks to your needs, keep track and stay connected with your team

sales.description: Optimize all interactions with your customers

1.title: Find & connect
1.description: with potential leads using our integrated search system and communication features.

2.title: Organize & manage leads
2.description: effectively with a well-defined structure for products and campaigns. Take advantage of a flexible follow-up process to boost engagement and increase sales opportunities.

3.description: helps you to track and understand sales performance and trends, enabling you to refine strategies, enhance outcomes, and make data-driven decisions that boost overall sales effectiveness.

3.description: as a database resource accessible to specific workflow users.

subsidies.description: Manage your grants for R&D projects and ensure uniform and clean documentation.

1.title: Effortless Grant Management
1.description: Streamline your R&D funding process with an intuitive platform to track, apply for, and manage grants.

2.title: Compliance & Documentation
2.description: Ensure regulatory compliance with automated tracking of required documents and timesheets.

3.title: Funding Potential Optimization
3.description: Identify untapped funding opportunities and maximize your grant utilization through insightful analytics.

internalCustomers.description: Support existing customers, customer projects, and customer activities.

clusterPdf.description: Edit and convert from and to PDF

1.title: Convert and edit PDFs
1.description: Easily convert documents to and from PDF, including Word, Excel, images, and more. Edit and modify PDFs seamlessly.

2.title: Manage and organize files
2.description: Merge, split, rotate, and protect PDF files with built-in tools to enhance document handling and security.

3.title: Sign and secure documents
3.description: Fill, sign, and request digital signatures, ensuring secure and authenticated document workflows.

externalForms.description: Create forms to collect data from external sources

1.title: Create and customize forms
1.description: Design professional forms with customizable fields, colors, and layouts to fit your needs.

2.title: Share and collect responses
2.description: Distribute your forms via links and collect structured data in real-time from any device.

3.title: Analyze submissions
3.description: Track responses, review analytics, and gain insights to improve data collection and decision-making.

bulkMailing.description: Send one-time and recurring emails such as newsletters, internal emails, or reminders

1.title: Effortless Campaign Creation
1.description: Design professional, visually appealing email campaigns using customizable templates from the Template Manager.

2.title: Targeted Audience Management
2.description: Create personalized campaigns by building targeted audiences and importing contacts from HR, Customer, or Contacts apps. Streamlined tools make the process easy for everyone, regardless of technical expertise.

3.title: Optimized Scheduling
3.description: Schedule send dates in advance to deliver your emails at the most effective times for audience engagement.

integration.description: Sync time tracking, people and tasks and create projects & workplans based on your Structure.

1.title: Cross-Platform Connectivity
1.description: Effortlessly sync data between multiple applications, ensuring smooth and automated workflows across different tools.

2.title: Smart Automation & Data Flow
2.description: Streamline operations by automating repetitive tasks, synchronizing records, and reducing manual errors for increased efficiency.

3.title: Customizable Integrations
3.description: Tailor integrations based on business needs, with flexible API support and scalable infrastructure to connect existing and future applications.
